title: Industrial Strategy Advisory Council meeting minutes, 25 September 2025
body: "The ninth meeting of the Industrial Strategy Advisory Council (ISAC) took place at McKinsey and Company, London on Thursday 25 September 2025.  It was chaired by Dame Clare Barclay DBE and attended by:   council members senior officials the secretariat of the ISAC    The Minister for Small Business and Economic Transformation joined the meeting for item 4 of the agenda.  "
